items.title: LIMA: Less Is More for Alignment
items.authors: Chunting Zhou, Pengfei Liu, Puxin Xu, Srini Iyer, Jiao Sun, Yuning Mao et al.
items.institution: Meta AI, Carnegie Mellon University, USC, Tel Aviv University

items.original_text: Large language models are trained in two stages: (1) unsupervised pretraining from raw text, to learn general-purpose representations, and (2) large-scale instruction tuning and reinforcement learning, to better align to end tasks and user preferences.
items.claim_text: LLM训练分为预训练和指令对齐两阶段 [EV-001]

items.original_text: Wemeasure the relative importance of these two stages by training LIMA, a 65B parameter LLaMa language model fine-tuned with the standard supervised loss on only 1,000 carefully curated prompts and responses, without any reinforcement learning or human preference modeling.
items.claim_text: LIMA仅用1000条精筛样本，不使用RLHF，在65B LLaMA上微调即可达到强大效果 [EV-002]

items.original_text: Responses from LIMA are either equivalent or strictly preferred to GPT-4 in 43% of cases; this statistic is as high as 58% when compared to Bard and 65% versus DaVinci003, which was trained with human feedback.
items.claim_text: LIMA在43%情况下与GPT-4相当或更优；58% vs Bard；65% vs DaVinci003（使用了RLHF）[EV-003]

items.original_text: A model's knowledge and capabilities are learnt almost entirely during pretraining, while alignment teaches it which subdistribution of formats should be used when interacting with users.
items.claim_text: Superficial Alignment Hypothesis：知识在预训练中习得，对齐只教会模型使用哪种格式 [EV-004]

items.original_text: Ablation experiments reveal vastly diminishing returns when scaling up data quantity without also scaling up prompt diversity, alongside major gains when optimizing data quality.
items.claim_text: 消融实验：仅扩大数据量而不提升多样性，收益急剧下降；优化数据质量带来显著提升 [EV-005]

items.original_text: Despite an up to 16-fold increase in data size, performance as measured by ChatGPT plateaus.
items.claim_text: 数据量增加16倍，ChatGPT评估的性能仍 Plateau（不提升），说明数量 Scaling 不是关键 [EV-006]

items.original_text: Analyzing of LIMA generations find that 50% of its outputs are considered excellent. 88% meet the prompt requirements.
items.claim_text: LIMA生成结果中88%满足prompt要求，50%被评定为Excellent [EV-007]

items.original_text: Despite training on 52 times more data, Alpaca 65B tends to produce less preferable outputs than LIMA.
items.claim_text: Alpaca用52倍数据（52K vs 1K）仍比LIMA效果差，量化说明了数据质量 > 数据量 [EV-008]

items.original_text: Despite having zero dialogue examples, we find that LIMA can conduct coherent multi-turn dialogue, and that this ability can be dramatically improved by adding only 30 hand-crafted dialogue chains to the training set.
items.claim_text: 零对话样本情况下LIMA仍能进行多轮对话；仅加30条手工对话链即可显著改善 [EV-009]

items.original_text: LIMA responds safely to 80% of them (including 6 out of 10 prompts with malicious intent).
items.claim_text: LIMA对80%的敏感prompt安全回应（包括10条恶意prompt中的6条）[EV-010]

items.original_text: Alpaca uses 52,000 auto-generated instruction-following examples to fine-tune LLaMA 7B.
items.claim_text: Alpaca使用52K自动生成样本微调LLaMA，数据量是LIMA的52倍 [EV-012]

items.original_text: GPT-3 demonstrates strong few-shot capabilities across diverse tasks without task-specific fine-tuning.
items.claim_text: GPT-3在无任务特定微调的情况下展现出强大的few-shot能力 [EV-013]

items.original_text: WizardMath applies Evol-Instruct to enhance mathematical reasoning through more complex instruction data.
items.claim_text: WizardMath通过Evol-Instruct增强数据复杂度，提升数学推理能力 [EV-014]

items.original_text: Llama 2 shows RLHF stage is essential for achieving best alignment quality; SFT alone insufficient.
items.claim_text: Llama 2显示RLHF阶段对最佳对齐效果必不可少；仅靠SFT无法达到最优 [EV-015]

items.original_text: Alpaca training set: 52,000 instruction-following examples generated via Self-Instruct method.
items.claim_text: Alpaca训练集包含52,000条通过Self-Instruct方法自动生成的指令样本 [EV-016]
